commands.repair_reason: Security-labeled external PR needs maintainer/security review, usage-cost proof, docs alignment, and OpenGrep asset verification or removal before merge.; Needs attention: The workflow diff introduces a supply-chain concern by executing a downloaded OpenGrep release binary without integrity or signature verification.; Review finding: [P2] Verify the OpenGrep asset before executing it — .github/workflows/opengrep-pre... (sha=d73e4c8aba14d3cd90473892bd7b3793153c5458)
commands.review_summary:
The PR clears diagnostic state for `noop/no_active_work` stuck-session recovery, adds regression coverage and changelog entries, changes `models.json` cost lookup to honor active/default agent dirs, rewires OpenGrep workflows to download the pinned binary asset directly, and updates a Codex test cast.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows `noop/no_active_work` can be returned but is rejected by the mutation predicate, so the coordinator returns before clearing diagnostic state; the PR body also reports a failing regression test before the fix.
commands.review_followup: Security-labeled external PR needs maintainer/security review, usage-cost proof, docs alignment, and OpenGrep asset verification or removal before merge.
